prompt:
あなたはTOEIC Part 4のテスト作成専門家で、1人のスピーカーによるモノローグ形式の英語リスニング問題の作成を専門としています。

TOEIC Part 4の形式:
- 1人による連続したスピーチ（30-60秒程度）
- スピーチ内容に関する3問の理解問題
- 各問題は4つの選択肢（A, B, C, D）
- 音声のみでスピーチと問題が読み上げられる

スピーチの特徴:
- 自然で実用的な英語のモノローグ
- 企業アナウンス、イベント案内、ラジオ放送など
- 明確な目的と構造がある内容
- 聞き手に情報を伝える、説明する、案内する

重要な指示:
- スピーカーの立場と目的を明確に設定
- 論理的で聞きやすい構成
- 指定された難易度に適した語彙と構文
- 質問の正解位置は指定された位置に必ず配置

難易度ガイドライン:
- Easy: シンプルな構文、基本的な語彙、明確な情報構造
- Medium: 標準的な構文、一般的なビジネス語彙、やや複雑な情報
- Hard: 複雑な構文、高度な語彙、詳細で複雑な情報

IMPORTANT: Return ONLY valid JSON in the exact format shown below. Do not include any other text, explanations, or markdown formatting.

応答は以下の形式のJSONで返してください:
{
  "speechContent": {
    "speaker": {
      "id": "A",
      "name": "適切な話者名（例: Announcer, Manager, Guide）",
      "role": "話者の役割（例: Company spokesperson, Event coordinator）",
      "gender": "male/female"
    },
    "text": "スピーチの完全な内容（5-8文程度）",
    "topic": "スピーチの主題"
  },
  "questions": [
    {
      "id": 1,
      "question": "問題文",
      "options": ["選択肢A", "選択肢B", "選択肢C", "選択肢D"],
      "correct": "正解のテキスト（選択肢の中から1つ）",
      "correctPosition": "A/B/C/D",
      "explanation": "なぜその答えが正しいかの説明（日本語）",
      "questionType": "main_purpose/detail/inference/next_action/intended_audience"
    },
    // 同様に合計3問
  ]
}

Generate a TOEIC Part 4 speech with the following specifications:

【Speech Type】: Public event announcement (公共イベントの案内)
【Industry】: Construction (建設業)
【Difficulty】: hard
【Question Types】: main_purpose, main_purpose, main_purpose
【Correct Answer Positions】: Question 1=D, Question 2=C, Question 3=B

Create a natural monologue speech appropriate for the specified speech type and industry context. The speech should be 30-60 seconds when read aloud (approximately 100-150 words).

For each question:
- Place the correct answer at the EXACT position specified above
- Ensure all other options are plausible but clearly incorrect
- Match the question type specified for each question

Return the response in the specified JSON format.

```json
{
  "speechContent": {
    "speaker": {
      "id": "A",
      "name": "Announcer",
      "role": "Event coordinator",
      "gender": "female"
    },
    "text": "Good morning, everyone. I am pleased to announce the official opening of the Greenfield Construction Expo, taking place this weekend at the City Convention Center. This event is designed to showcase the latest innovations in sustainable building practices and eco-friendly technologies. Attendees will have the opportunity to attend workshops led by industry experts, view live demonstrations of state-of-the-art equipment, and network with leading professionals in the construction sector. Whether you are a seasoned contractor or a student eager to learn, this expo promises a wealth of information and inspiration. Registration is required for entry, and you can secure your spot by visiting our website. We look forward to seeing you there and sharing insights that will shape the future of construction.",
    "topic": "Announcement of the Greenfield Construction Expo"
  },
  "questions": [
    {
      "id": 1,
      "question": "What is the main purpose of the announcement?",
      "options": [
        "To advertise a new construction project",
        "To recruit new employees for a construction company",
        "To promote a training program for contractors",
        "To announce the opening of a construction expo"
      ],
      "correct": "To announce the opening of a construction expo",
      "correctPosition": "D",
      "explanation": "スピーチはGreenfield Construction Expoの開催を知らせることを目的としているため、設問の正解はこの選択肢です。",
      "questionType": "main_purpose"
    },
    {
      "id": 2,
      "question": "What is the main purpose of this event?",
      "options": [
        "To sell construction equipment",
        "To award outstanding construction projects",
        "To showcase innovations in sustainable building",
        "To celebrate the anniversary of a construction company"
      ],
      "correct": "To showcase innovations in sustainable building",
      "correctPosition": "C",
      "explanation": "イベントの目的は持続可能な建築の革新を紹介することであるとスピーチで述べられているため、これが正解です。",
      "questionType": "main_purpose"
    },
    {
      "id": 3,
      "question": "Who is the intended audience for this event?",
      "options": [
        "Local government officials",
        "Construction professionals and students",
        "Residents of the nearby community",
        "Suppliers of raw materials"
      ],
      "correct": "Construction professionals and students",
      "correctPosition": "B",
      "explanation": "スピーチでは、業界の専門家や学びたい学生を対象にしていると述べられているため、これが正解です。",
      "questionType": "main_purpose"
    }
  ]
}
```

あなたは英日翻訳の専門家です。TOEIC Part 4のスピーチと関連情報を日本語に翻訳してください。

重要:
- 自然で分かりやすい日本語に翻訳
- ビジネス用語は適切な日本語表現を使用
- 文脈を考慮した翻訳

Return ONLY valid JSON without any markdown formatting or explanations.

Translate the following Part 4 speech content to Japanese:

Speech Type: public_event_notice
Industry: construction
Speaker Role: Event coordinator
Topic: Announcement of the Greenfield Construction Expo

Speech Text:
Good morning, everyone. I am pleased to announce the official opening of the Greenfield Construction Expo, taking place this weekend at the City Convention Center. This event is designed to showcase the latest innovations in sustainable building practices and eco-friendly technologies. Attendees will have the opportunity to attend workshops led by industry experts, view live demonstrations of state-of-the-art equipment, and network with leading professionals in the construction sector. Whether you are a seasoned contractor or a student eager to learn, this expo promises a wealth of information and inspiration. Registration is required for entry, and you can secure your spot by visiting our website. We look forward to seeing you there and sharing insights that will shape the future of construction.

Return the translations in this JSON format:
{
  "speechTypeTranslation": "スピーチタイプの日本語訳",
  "textTranslation": "スピーチ全文の日本語訳",
  "topicTranslation": "トピックの日本語訳"
}

あなたは英日翻訳の専門家です。TOEIC Part 4の問題と選択肢を日本語に翻訳してください。

重要:
- 問題文は明確で分かりやすい日本語に
- 選択肢も正確に翻訳
- TOEIC問題の慣例に従った表現を使用

Return ONLY valid JSON without any markdown formatting or explanations.

Translate the following Part 4 questions and options to Japanese:

Question 1: What is the main purpose of the announcement?
Options:
A: To advertise a new construction project
B: To recruit new employees for a construction company
C: To promote a training program for contractors
D: To announce the opening of a construction expo

Question 2: What is the main purpose of this event?
Options:
A: To sell construction equipment
B: To award outstanding construction projects
C: To showcase innovations in sustainable building
D: To celebrate the anniversary of a construction company

Question 3: Who is the intended audience for this event?
Options:
A: Local government officials
B: Construction professionals and students
C: Residents of the nearby community
D: Suppliers of raw materials

Return the translations in this JSON format:
{
  "questionsTranslations": [
    {
      "questionTranslation": "問題1の日本語訳",
      "optionTranslations": ["選択肢Aの日本語訳", "選択肢Bの日本語訳", "選択肢Cの日本語訳", "選択肢Dの日本語訳"]
    },
    // 同様に3問分
  ]
}

Generate a TOEIC Part 4 speech with the following specifications:

【Speech Type】: Training or orientation session (研修・オリエンテーション)
【Industry】: Finance and Banking (金融・銀行)
【Difficulty】: hard
【Question Types】: next_action, detail, next_action
【Correct Answer Positions】: Question 1=D, Question 2=C, Question 3=C

Create a natural monologue speech appropriate for the specified speech type and industry context. The speech should be 30-60 seconds when read aloud (approximately 100-150 words).

For each question:
- Place the correct answer at the EXACT position specified above
- Ensure all other options are plausible but clearly incorrect
- Match the question type specified for each question

Return the response in the specified JSON format.

```json
{
  "speechContent": {
    "speaker": {
      "id": "A",
      "name": "Trainer",
      "role": "Financial Training Specialist",
      "gender": "female"
    },
    "text": "Good afternoon, everyone. Welcome to our advanced financial analysis training session. Today, we will delve into the nuances of risk assessment and portfolio management strategies. First, we will review the latest regulatory changes affecting our industry, focusing on compliance requirements and their implications for risk analysis. Following this, we’ll conduct a comprehensive case study to apply these concepts practically. Please have your laptops ready, as you will need to access our internal database for this exercise. After the case study, there will be a brief Q&A session where you can address any specific concerns. Finally, you will be given a short quiz to assess your understanding of today's material. Remember, these skills are essential for enhancing our decision-making processes and maintaining our competitive edge in the financial sector.",
    "topic": "Advanced financial analysis training session"
  },
  "questions": [
    {
      "id": 1,
      "question": "What should participants do right after the case study?",
      "options": [
        "Review regulatory changes",
        "Complete the quiz",
        "Discuss in groups",
        "Participate in a Q&A session"
      ],
      "correct": "Participate in a Q&A session",
      "correctPosition": "D",
      "explanation": "スピーチで、ケーススタディの後にQ&Aセッションがあると述べられている。",
      "questionType": "next_action"
    },
    {
      "id": 2,
      "question": "What is the primary focus of the session?",
      "options": [
        "Introduction to basic finance",
        "Customer service strategies",
        "Risk assessment and portfolio management",
        "Technological advancements in banking"
      ],
      "correct": "Risk assessment and portfolio management",
      "correctPosition": "C",
      "explanation": "スピーチの冒頭で、リスク評価とポートフォリオ管理の戦略に焦点を当てると述べられている。",
      "questionType": "detail"
    },
    {
      "id": 3,
      "question": "What is required from participants during the case study?",
      "options": [
        "To present their findings",
        "To complete a written report",
        "To access the internal database",
        "To conduct external interviews"
      ],
      "correct": "To access the internal database",
      "correctPosition": "C",
      "explanation": "スピーチで、ケーススタディの際に内部データベースにアクセスする必要があると述べられている。",
      "questionType": "next_action"
    }
  ]
}
```

あなたは英日翻訳の専門家です。TOEIC Part 4のスピーチと関連情報を日本語に翻訳してください。

重要:
- 自然で分かりやすい日本語に翻訳
- ビジネス用語は適切な日本語表現を使用
- 文脈を考慮した翻訳

Return ONLY valid JSON without any markdown formatting or explanations.

Translate the following Part 4 speech content to Japanese:

Speech Type: training_session
Industry: finance
Speaker Role: Financial Training Specialist
Topic: Advanced financial analysis training session

Speech Text:
Good afternoon, everyone. Welcome to our advanced financial analysis training session. Today, we will delve into the nuances of risk assessment and portfolio management strategies. First, we will review the latest regulatory changes affecting our industry, focusing on compliance requirements and their implications for risk analysis. Following this, we’ll conduct a comprehensive case study to apply these concepts practically. Please have your laptops ready, as you will need to access our internal database for this exercise. After the case study, there will be a brief Q&A session where you can address any specific concerns. Finally, you will be given a short quiz to assess your understanding of today's material. Remember, these skills are essential for enhancing our decision-making processes and maintaining our competitive edge in the financial sector.

}
